chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.284 of 2024 Dr. Farzana Shaheen Versus Syed Abid Ali & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 143/25 2. For orders on office objections as at “A” 3. For orders on CMA 1832/24 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For orders on CMA 1833/24 Dated: 28.01.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani for appellant. Mr. Khalid Javed for respondent No.5/Karachi University on statutory notice. Mr. Anwar Mansoor Khan along with Ms. Umaimah A. Khan for interveners. -.-.- It is contended by Mr. Lakhani that since this appeal is against an ad-interim order on an interlocutory application and since subsequent orders have been passed on the very interlocutory application, the passing of subsequent orders have rendered this appeal as infructuous and as such, on instructions, he does not press this appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Chief Justice Judge
